name: Daffodil Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon lemon or lime peel, grated
2 tablespoons lemon or lime peel, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sift together the flour and 3/4 cup of sugar three times.
3. In a large mixing bowl, whisk egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually beat in 1 cup sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Sift about 1/4 of the flour mixture over the egg whites, gently folding.
6. Repeat with remaining flour mixture, 1/4 at a time. Fold in vanilla extract.
7. Remove one-third of the batter and set aside.
8. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks, 2 tablespoons flour, and 2 tablespoons sugar until thick and pale yellow.
9. Stir in lemon or lime peel.
10. Fold about 1/2 cup of the reserved batter into the egg yolk mixture, then gently fold into the reserved batter.
11. Spoon white and yellow batters alternately into an ungreased tube pan, using a knife to eliminate air pockets and swirl the batters.
12. Bake in the lower third of the oven for 35-40 minutes.
13. Invert the pan to cool.
14. When cooled, remove from the pan and drizzle warm glaze over the top or serve the sauce on the side.
Glaze:
1. Cook sugar, cornstarch, and water over medium heat until smooth and thickened.
2. Add lemon or lime peel, juice, and butter, then cook until warm.
